de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class SequentChangeInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.SequentChangeInfo

  • public class SequentChangeInfo
extends Object
    Records the changes made to a sequent. Keeps track of added and removed formula to one of the semisequents. The intersection of added and removed formulas of the same semisequent may not be empty, in particular this means that a formula added and removed afterwards will occur in both lists. The situation where this can happen is that a list of formulas had to be added to the sequent and the list has not been redundance free.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private SemisequentChangeInfo antecedent
      change information related to the antecedent, this means the there added and removed formulas
      private Sequent originalSequent
      the sequent before the changes
      private Sequent resultingSequent
      the sequent after the changes
      private SemisequentChangeInfo succedent
      change information related to the antecedent, this means the there added and removed formulas

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<SequentFormula> addedFormulas()
      The formulas added to the sequent are returned as a concatenated list of the formulas added to each semisequent.

      The formulas added to one of the semisequents are returned.
      void combine(SequentChangeInfo succ)
      This method combines the change information from this info and its successor.
      static SequentChangeInfo createSequentChangeInfo(boolean antec, SemisequentChangeInfo semiCI, Sequent result, Sequent original)
      creates a new sequent change info whose semisequent described by the value of the selector antec (true selects antecedent; false selects succedent) has changed.

      creates a new sequent change info whose semisequent described by position pos has changed.
      static SequentChangeInfo createSequentChangeInfo(SemisequentChangeInfo anteCI, SemisequentChangeInfo sucCI, Sequent result, Sequent original)
      creates a new sequent change info whose semisequents have changed.

      returns true if the selected part of sequent has changed.
      ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> modifiedFormulas()
      The formulas modified within the sequent are returned as a concatenated list of the formulas modified within each each semisequent.
      ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> modifiedFormulas(boolean antec)
      The formulas modified within one of the semisequents are returned.

      Returns the formulas that have been rejected when trying to add as being redundant.

      The formulas removed from the sequent are returned as a concatenated list of the formulas removed from each semisequent.

    • Field Detail

      • antecedent

        private SemisequentChangeInfo antecedent
        change information related to the antecedent, this means the there added and removed formulas

      • succedent

        private SemisequentChangeInfo succedent
        change information related to the antecedent, this means the there added and removed formulas

        private Sequent originalSequent
        the sequent before the changes

      • resultingSequent

        private Sequent resultingSequent
        the sequent after the changes

    • Constructor Detail

      • SequentChangeInfo

        private SequentChangeInfo(SemisequentChangeInfo antecedent,
                          SemisequentChangeInfo succedent,
                          Sequent resultingSequent,
                          Sequent originalSequent)
        creates a new sequent change information object. Therefore it combines the changes to the semisequents of the sequent.
        Parameters:
        antecedent - the SemisequentChangeInfo describing the changes of the antecedent
        succedent - the SemisequentChangeInfo describing the changes of the succedent
        resultingSequent - the Sequent being the result of the changes
        originalSequent - the Sequent that has been transformed

    • Method Detail

      • createSequentChangeInfo

        public static SequentChangeInfo createSequentChangeInfo(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                        SemisequentChangeInfo semiCI,
                                                        Sequent result,
                                                        Sequent original)
        creates a new sequent change info whose semisequent described by position pos has changed. The made changes are stored in semiCI and the resulting sequent is given by result
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosInOccurrence describing the semisequent where the changes took place
        semiCI - the SemisequentChangeInfo describing the changes in detail (which formulas have been added/removed)
        Returns:
        the sequent change information object describing the complete changes made to the sequent together with the operations result.

      • createSequentChangeInfo

        public static SequentChangeInfo createSequentChangeInfo(boolean antec,
                                                        SemisequentChangeInfo semiCI,
                                                        Sequent result,
                                                        Sequent original)
        creates a new sequent change info whose semisequent described by the value of the selector antec (true selects antecedent; false selects succedent) has changed. The made changes are stored in semiCI and the resulting sequent is given by result
        Parameters:
        antec - a boolean indicating if the given semisequent change information describes the changes of the antecedent or succedent
        semiCI - the SemisequentChangeInfo describing the changes in detail (which formulas have been added/removed)
        result - the Sequent which is the result of the changes
        original - the Sequent to which the described changes have been applied
        Returns:
        the sequent change information object describing the complete changes made to the sequent together with the operations result.

      • createSequentChangeInfo

        public static SequentChangeInfo createSequentChangeInfo(SemisequentChangeInfo anteCI,
                                                        SemisequentChangeInfo sucCI,
                                                        Sequent result,
                                                        Sequent original)
        creates a new sequent change info whose semisequents have changed. The made changes are stored in semiCI and the resulting sequent is given by result
        Parameters:
        anteCI - the SemisequentChangeInfo describing the changes of the antecedent in detail (which formulas have been added/removed)
        sucCI - the SemisequentChangeInfo describing the changes of the succedent detail (which formulas have been added/removed)
        Returns:
        the sequent change information object describing the complete changes made to the sequent together with the operations result.

      • hasChanged

        public boolean hasChanged()
        returns true iff the sequent has been changed by the operation
        Returns:
        true iff the sequent has been changed by the operation

      • hasChanged

        public boolean hasChanged(boolean antec)
        returns true if the selected part of sequent has changed. Thereby the flag 'antec' specifies the selection: true selects the antecedent and false the succedent of the sequent.
        Returns:
        true iff the sequent has been changed by the operation

      • getSemisequentChangeInfo

        public SemisequentChangeInfo getSemisequentChangeInfo(boolean antec)

      • addedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> addedFormulas(boolean antec)
        The formulas added to one of the semisequents are returned. The selected semisequent depends on the value of selector 'antec' which is the antecedent if 'antec' is true and the succedent otherwise.
        Parameters:
        antec - a boolean used to select one of the two semisequents of a sequent (true means antecedent; false means succedent)
        Returns:
        list of formulas added to the selected semisequent

      • addedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> addedFormulas()
        The formulas added to the sequent are returned as a concatenated list of the formulas added to each semisequent.
        Returns:
        list of formulas added to sequent

      • removedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> removedFormulas(boolean antec)
        The formulas removed from one of the semisequents are returned. The selected semisequent depends on the value of selector 'antec' which is the antecedent if 'antec' is true and the succedent otherwise.
        Parameters:
        antec - a boolean used to select one of the two semisequents of a sequent (true means antecedent; false means succedent)
        Returns:
        list of formulas removed from the selected semisequent

      • removedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> removedFormulas()
        The formulas removed from the sequent are returned as a concatenated list of the formulas removed from each semisequent.
        Returns:
        list of formulas removed from the sequent

      • modifiedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> modifiedFormulas(boolean antec)
        The formulas modified within one of the semisequents are returned. The selected semisequent depends on the value of selector 'antec' which is the antecedent if 'antec' is true and the succedent otherwise.
        Parameters:
        antec - a boolean used to select one of the two semisequents of a sequent (true means antecedent; false means succedent)
        Returns:
        list of formulas modified within the selected semisequent

      • modifiedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> modifiedFormulas()
        The formulas modified within the sequent are returned as a concatenated list of the formulas modified within each each semisequent.
        Returns:
        list of formulas modified to sequent

      • rejectedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> rejectedFormulas(boolean antec)
        Returns the formulas that have been rejected when trying to add as being redundant.
        Parameters:
        antec - a boolean used to select one of the two semisequents of a sequent (true means antecedent; false means succedent)
        Returns:
        list of formulas rejected when trying to add to the selected semisequent

      • rejectedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> rejectedFormulas()
        Returns the formulas that have been rejected when trying to add as being redundant.
        Returns:
        list of rejected formulas

      • combine

        public void combine(SequentChangeInfo succ)
        This method combines the change information from this info and its successor. ATTENTION: it takes over ownership over succ and does not release it. This means when invoking the method it must be ensured that succ is never used afterwards.

      • getOriginalSequent

        public Sequent getOriginalSequent()
        Returns:
        the original sequent

      • sequent

        public Sequent sequent()
        returns the resulting sequent
        Returns:
        the resulting sequent
